content:
# Damkholernumber

**Summary**: A dimensionless number relating the rate of chemical reaction to the rate of diffusion.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017]] used Damkholer numbers to determine optimal acid injection rates.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017]] Used to determine the optimal injection rates for acid stimulation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017]] Calculated from chemical kinetics and physical properties of the rock.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Optimal wormholes are typically formed at modified Damkholer numbers between 0.17 and 0.3. ([[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017, p. 48]])
